'''Chine-Kal''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He was the commanding officer aboard a [[yammosk]] [[clustership]].

==Biography==
[[File:Chine-kal2.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Chine-kal attacks a Jedi.]]

Chine-Kal's carrier held [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] captured from [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] and [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]]. While onboard, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Wurth Skidder]] tried to persuade the yammosk that [[Randa Besadii Diori]], a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who was also a prisoner onboard, was plotting to kill Chine-Kal. However, the yammosk saw straight through Skidder's plan and informed Chine-Kal that he was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. The ship was boarded by Jedi Knights [[Kyp Durron]] and [[Ganner Rhysode]], and though they were unable to save Wurth Skidder, they killed the yammosk and fled with the surviving prisoners. With the yammosk dead, the ship fell apart, and eventually died. Chine-Kal was killed. Randa later described him as [[Tsavong Lah]]'s kinsman, thus identifying him as a very probable member of [[Domain Lah]].
